campaign_step_intention_desc: Define the objective of your campaign
campaign_intention_title: What is the intention of your campaign?
campaign_intention_description: Describe the main objective of your campaign
campaign_intention_placeholder: Examples: Promoting Black Friday discounts, launching a new product, reactivating inactive customers...
campaign_review_description: You can edit the content before sending it.
campaign_text_placeholder: Your campaign text will appear here...
campaign_cta_description: Add an action button so users can interact directly
edit_image_prompt: Do you want to modify the image? Describe the changes.
edit_image_placeholder: For example: Make it more colorful, add a blue background...
edit_text_prompt: Do you want AI to improve the text? Describe the changes.
edit_text_placeholder: For example: Make it shorter, add emojis, make it more formal...

campaign_audience_description: Define who will receive your campaign
campaign_summary_description: Review the information before creating the campaign
